headline: 3 contracts catalogued on Solana: BNSOL token, Binance stake pool, and SPL Stake Pool Program

findings.text: Solana Name Tag search: BNSOL token and Binance stake pool identified via Binance support documentation and Solana Compass

Official deployment docs: BNSOL token address BNso1VUJnh4zcfpZa6986Ea66P6TCp59hvtNJ8b1X85 documented on Binance support FAQ; stake pool Hr9pzexrBge3vgmBNRR8u42CNQgBXdHm4UkUN2DH4a7r documented on SolanaCompass; no single canonical 'deployments' page found

Audit PDFs: Neodyme Stake Pool Audit dated 2023-11-14 and Halborn Stake Pool Audit from audit_links; both reference SPL Stake Pool Program audits rather than Binance-specific contract code; scope applies to Solana Labs' reference implementation used by BNSOL
GitHub deployment artifacts: protocol.github field is null; no repository identified for Binance BNSOL implementation code
Single chain protocol: Solana only; no multi-chain variants within pinned chains
No factory pattern identified; Binance BNSOL operates as a single stake pool instance, not a factory with enumerable children
All addresses traced to fetched documentation and Solana block explorer data; no snippet-only sightings

rationale.verdict: Discovery assessment: 3 protocol contracts identified on Solana via official Binance documentation, Solana block explorers, and audited Solana Labs stake-pool program references. No GitHub source code repo provided; next run should attempt to locate Binance's source repository or confirmation that implementation is unmodified SPL Stake Pool Program.

evidence.shows: BNSOL token address on Solana Network listed as BNso1VUJnh4zcfpZa6986Ea66P6TCp59hvtNJ8b1X85
Confirmation of BNSOL token address and description as official Solana contract for Binance Staked SOL
Binance BNSOL stake pool address Hr9pzexrBge3vgmBNRR8u42CNQgBXdHm4UkUN2DH4a7r using spl-stake-pool on-chain program
Official Binance announcement confirming BNSOL use of Solana Labs' Stake Pool Program audited by multiple security firms
Solana Labs stake pool audit reports listing Neodyme Stake Pool Audit 2023-11-14 and Halborn Stake Pool Audit 2023-01-25 (plus 2023-11-14 versions)
Audit PDF link for Neodyme Stake Pool Audit referenced in pinned audit_links
Audit PDF link for Halborn Stake Pool Audit referenced in pinned audit_links
Official Binance SOL Staking marketing page describing BNSOL as liquid staking token and protocol mechanics

unknowns: D4: No GitHub repository provided in protocol.github; source code location for Binance BNSOL implementation not discovered
D2: No canonical deployed contracts documentation page with structured address listing found; addresses surfaced via support FAQ and block explorer only
D6: Validator delegation structure not fully enumerated; Binance operates multiple validator nodes but individual stake account addresses not catalogued

protocol_metadata.about: Binance Staked SOL (BNSOL) is a liquid staking token issued by Binance that enables users to stake SOL tokens while maintaining liquidity and earning staking rewards. Users deposit SOL into Binance's stake pool—built on the audited Solana Labs Stake Pool Program—and receive BNSOL tokens representing their staked assets plus accumulated rewards. BNSOL can be traded, transferred, or used in DeFi protocols while continuing to accrue staking yield. Binance operates multiple validators and absorbs slashing losses.
